title: Deals & Offers
heroImageAlt: Family enjoying a tropical beach holiday — father lifting his daughter as her mother smiles
intro: Seasonal fare sales, partner bank offers and bundle deals to help you fly for less. This page is updated as campaigns launch — bookmark it and check before each trip.

sections.p: New travellers can use code FLYNEW15 at checkout to take 15% off the FlyAir service component of a first flight booking (subject to a maximum discount cap and excluding government taxes). The code is single-use per customer and email address.

We regularly run extra-savings and instalment campaigns with Sri Lankan banks — currently active partner cards include Sampath Bank, Commercial Bank, HNB and Nations Trust Bank (American Express). Card-specific offers appear on the payment page when you enter your card number.

Selected campaigns offer double frequent-flyer miles on long-haul itineraries booked through FlyAir. Where available, the offer is automatic — miles are credited by the operating airline after your travel under your provided membership number.

Travelling with three or more passengers? Our consultants can often access NEGOTIATED group fares not visible online, especially for popular routes from Colombo. Write to info@flyair.lk with your route, dates and group size and we will quote within one working day.

Major fare sales typically run around: SriLankan Airlines New Year promotion (April), Eid offers (timed to the Islamic calendar), Avurudu holidays (April), summer Europe/UK sales (May–June), and end-of-year specials (November–December). We notify subscribers by email when sales open — sign up from the footer.

Combine a flight with a hotel, transfer or insurance through our sister brand travellers.lk and we can usually quote a better bundled price than separate bookings. For tour packages, see Travellers Holidays for curated trips with pre-negotiated rates.

Promotional codes apply to the FlyAir service component and do not reduce airline taxes or mandatory charges. Most codes are single-use, non-transferable, and cannot be combined with other offers. Each campaign’s exact terms appear on the campaign page or are quoted at checkout.
